briefs.title: B.C. Reg. 232/2025 Enacted via Order-in-Council 590/2025 — Details Unavailable
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 232/2025, enacted through OIC 590/2025, was published in B.C. Gazette No. 21 on December 16, 2025. Full regulatory text and subject matter are not available in the provided source.
briefs.action_required: Obtain the full text of B.C. Reg. 232/2025 from the B.C. Gazette to determine if your business is affected.
